result: If I could change the world in one way, I would eliminate the capacity for willful ignorance—the choice to ignore evidence, to reject empathy, or to dismiss the suffering of others when the truth is accessible. Not in the sense of forcing knowledge, but in removing the comfort of looking away. People could still disagree, still hold different values, but they would no longer be able to pretend they don’t know what they know.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
